title: papaver roseolum
intro: Papaver roseolum, also known as the yellow poppy or Meconopsis rosea, is a flowering plant species in the poppy family. This plant is native to the Himalayas and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Papaver roseolum include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and congestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used to support respiratory health and improve overall well-being.
